headline: Trane Technologies (TT) Appoints Donald Simmons And Launches Data Center Chiller In Asia Pacific
summary: Trane Technologies (NYSE:TT) appointed Donald Simmons as Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer. The company introduced the HSWE magnetic bearing centrifugal chiller focused on data center applications in Asia Pacific. Both developments highlight changes in leadership and product offerings that are specific to the data center infrastructure segment. Trane Technologies, trading at a recent share price of $478.13, is a large industrial company focused on climate and energy...
